options.label: Region — Lowest latency within a single region
Dual-region — High availability across two regions
Multi-region — Highest availability across a large geographic area

Uniform — Ensures uniform access at bucket level (recommended)

fields.name: __help__
fields.value: Labels help you organize and filter your resources. Each label is a key-value pair.

eventarc/triggers.label: Triggers
eventarc/triggers.description: Triggers route events from Google Cloud services or third-party providers to destinations (Cloud Run, GKE, Workflows).

validate.message: lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; start with a letter

eventarc/channels.label: Channels
eventarc/channels.description: Channels deliver events from third-party providers (Datadog, Confluent, etc.) into Eventarc.

eventarc/providers.label: Event providers
eventarc/providers.description: All event providers available in this region (read-only catalog).

secretmanager/secrets.label: Secrets
secretmanager/secrets.description: Encrypted secrets stored at rest with Google-managed or customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK).

secretmanager/versions.label: Versions
secretmanager/versions.description: All versions across all secrets in this project. Older versions can be disabled or destroyed.

secretmanager/rotation.label: Rotation
secretmanager/rotation.description: Automatic rotation schedules — re-create secret versions on a cadence via Cloud Functions.

kms/keys.label: Keys
kms/keys.description: Cryptographic keys for encrypt/decrypt/sign/verify. Organized into key rings by region.

kms/keyrings.label: Key rings
kms/keyrings.description: Logical groupings of keys, scoped to a region.

kms/keyversions.label: Key versions
kms/keyversions.description: Version history of all keys. Older versions can be disabled or destroyed.

kms/importJobs.label: Import jobs
kms/importJobs.description: Wrapping jobs that bring your own key material into Cloud KMS.

kms/ekmConnections.label: EKM connections
kms/ekmConnections.description: External Key Manager connections — keep keys in a third-party HSM.
